FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Strong US Jobs Data Supports USD Strength
MA20 Acts as Near-Term Support Level
Oil Prices Rise Amid Geopolitical Tensions
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised for upside on robust US data and technical support at MA20. Buy dips with tight risk control.
FX.comment: Bullish setup confirmed by strong US data and MA20 support.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] FLAT: AI Detects Equilibrium Amid Fed Shuffle and Retail Rally
tldr_points: Fed leadership pivot to a former keystone regulator may tighten rates
Retail momentum from Amazon excites but is offset by sector rotation
Technical profile shows a consolidation near MA20 with RSI near 50
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 trades in a squeeze around MA20, with neutral trade calls due to mixed macro and sector signals.
STOCKS.comment: Await breakout confirmation before taking directional bets
